title: Enhancing gene transfer to renal tubules and podocytes by context-dependent selection of AAV capsids
author: Nakai, Hiroyuki
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RawData.zip file provides AAV Barcode-Seq raw read count data used for Figure 1 and Supplementary Figure 1. Each file represents NGS read count data of each barcode (BC) PCR product indicated in the file name. VBC_AAV_capsid_Conversion_Table.csv provides information about the barcodes, CAGBC101 to CAGBC223, used for AAV capsids contained in the library.
steps_raw: RawData.zip file provides AAV Barcode-Seq raw read count data used for Figure 1 and Supplementary Figure 1.
